name: PostClaw
description: PostgreSQL-backed RAG, memory, and persona management

dbUrl.description: PostgreSQL connection string (with pgvector extension enabled)

adminDbUrl.description: PostgreSQL superuser connection string (used by setup command only)

sleepIntervalHours.description: Hours between background sleep cycles (default: 6, set to 0 to disable)

dashboardEnabled.description: Enable the PostClaw web dashboard (default: false)

dashboardBindAddress.description: Bind address for the dashboard (default: 127.0.0.1). WARNING: Setting to 0.0.0.0 exposes the dashboard to the network.
